channel.title: Cdc on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Cdc on Pi Stack

item.title: Debezium vs Maxwell vs Canal: Best Self-Hosted CDC Tools 2026
item.description: Change Data Capture (CDC) is the backbone of modern data pipelines. Instead of running expensive, slow batch jobs that poll your database every few minutes, CDC streams every INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE in real time — giving downstream systems an exact replica of your data with sub-second latency.
